name: First Lieutenant Calvin Hargrove
role: Platoon Commander, Company A, 116th Infantry Regiment
publicFace: A composed, squared-away officer who speaks in clipped commands and projects certainty even when he has none — the kind of man soldiers follow because the alternative is paralysis.
privateGoal: To prove that the frontal assault doctrine he was ordered to execute was not a death sentence — that leadership and aggression can overcome what planning failed to provide.
fear: That the men dying around him are dying because of orders he did not question loudly enough in the planning stages.
knowledge: He knows the pre-assault intelligence estimated the 716th Division held Dog Green — not the battle-hardened 352nd, which changes the entire threat calculus.
He knows that Colonel Canham is somewhere on the beach and will relieve any officer who goes to ground — Hargrove's authority depends on being seen moving forward.
He has a marked map showing the planned route through the draw that is now three minutes obsolete.
voice: Flat, clipped, institutional — gives orders in the imperative without preamble, rarely asks questions, uses rank as punctuation.
trustLogic: Opens up when shown concrete tactical information that lets him revise his plan without admitting the original was wrong; shuts down completely when his authority is challenged publicly.
secrets: He froze for eleven seconds at the ramp drop — a paralysis he is certain his sergeant saw — and he has been overcorrecting with aggression ever since.
His marked map shows an alternate route through the bluff grass that bypasses the wire entirely, but he has not shared it because it would require splitting the platoon.

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Acknowledges the question with a nod, gives a partial answer, and immediately redirects to the tactical problem at hand.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Goes very still, meets the challenger's eyes, and speaks quietly — more dangerous than shouting.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will never admit the eleven-second freeze at the ramp.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Maintains rank and composure; attempts to negotiate from a position of authority even when he has none.
